name: I Am Ultimate Alpha Wolf Quest Simulator

reviews.review_description:
Really enjoyed this game. The world feels alive, gameplay is realistic, and building a pack is fun.
Would love more missions, smoother combat, and deeper customization.
This game is boring and terrible. Not a whole lot to do and wasn’t worth the money I spent. Wish I could get my money back

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback — we really appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts.

This is our first build, and we understand it may feel limited right now. We’re actively working on improvements, including more content, features, and overall gameplay enhancements in upcoming updates.

Your feedback helps us prioritize what to improve, and we’re committed to making the game better with each update. We hope you’ll give it another try in the future as we continue to evolve the experience.
